name: visionary-claude
description: Visual design plugin for Claude Code. 202 styles, 8-step selection algorithm with weighted random, Motion Scoring 2.0 (6 sub-dim Maturity Model), MLLM Judge tie-breaker, DINOv2 visual embeddings (opt-in), Active Governance pre-commit/CI gate, Taste Inheritance designer-as-subagent, Structural-Integrity Gate (v1.5.0) catching duplicate headings / collapsed footers / orphan labels, MCP-server for Cursor/Windsurf/Cline. axe-core-instrumented Playwright critique loop, DTCG token export, cross-session taste calibration. WCAG 2.2 AA + APCA compliant. 15 frameworks, 20+ languages.
